personas.name: User
personas.description: Consumes news videos in a seamless playback experience

actions: Mark the current user's conv_id as the source conv_id for the 2-hour window.
Retrieve teacher avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}
Assign one avatar to each genre: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, and Weather.
For each genre, fetch the latest headlines using a Google search query and generate a short narration script (e.g., “Here’s your quick update on [genre name]…”).
Generate one realistic AI video per genre using the assigned avatar and script.
Check video generation status using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} until all videos are marked as success.
Store all 5 videos under the source conv_id, saving metadata including genre → avatar → video URL, generation timestamp, and expiry timestamp (+2 hours).
flows.sub_goal: Create 5 realistic, pre-synthesized AI videos for each genre and store them for reuse across all users during the 2-hour cycle.

actions: Check if a source conv_id is already marked ready for the ongoing 2-hour window; if not, trigger Flow 1.
If available, fetch the 5 pre-generated videos linked to the source conv_id, along with assigned avatars.
Deliver the full set in sequence to the user, with no additional generation during the active window.
flows.sub_goal: Reuse the same 5-genre video set for all users within the current 2-hour window.

actions: Play all 5 genre videos (Politics → Weather) in order using the assigned avatars.
Automatically loop back to the first video after the last one finishes.
Continue playback until the 2-hour window ends or the user exits.
flows.sub_goal: Provide users a seamless, looping broadcast-like experience of the current news cycle.
